# RootsValidation.IsValidRoot method

Returns `true` when *root* satisfies the §21.1 `uri` constraints: a present `uri` that is a valid `file://` RFC 3986 URI. Mirrors TS `parseRoot` (the success branch). (R-21.1.5-b, R-21.1.5-d; AC-32.11)

```csharp
public static bool IsValidRoot(Root root)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| root | The candidate root. |

## Return Value

`true` when the root's `uri` is a valid `file://` URI.
